mapper.select: SELECT id, supply_id, title, type, category, status, user_id, company_name, contact_name, contact_phone, email, location, description, specifications, price, capacity, publish_date, tags, advantages, certifications, view_count, created_at, updated_at FROM supply_supplies ORDER BY publish_date DESC, created_at DESC

SELECT id, supply_id, title, type, category, status, user_id, company_name, contact_name, contact_phone, email, location, description, specifications, price, capacity, publish_date, tags, advantages, certifications, view_count, created_at, updated_at FROM supply_supplies WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, supply_id, title, type, category, status, user_id, company_name, contact_name, contact_phone, email, location, description, specifications, price, capacity, publish_date, tags, advantages, certifications, view_count, created_at, updated_at FROM supply_supplies WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY publish_date DESC, created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO supply_supplies ( supply_id, title, type, category, status, user_id, company_name, contact_name, contact_phone, email, location, description, specifications, price, capacity, publish_date, tags, advantages, certifications, view_count, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{supplyId}, #{title}, #{type}, #{category}, #{status}, #{userId}, #{companyName}, #{contactName}, #{contactPhone}, #{email}, #{location}, #{description}, #{specifications}, #{price}, #{capacity}, #{publishDate}, #{tags}, #{advantages}, #{certifications}, #{viewCount}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE supply_supplies SET title = #{title}, type = #{type}, category = #{category}, company_name = #{companyName}, contact_name = #{contactName}, contact_phone = #{contactPhone}, email = #{email}, location = #{location}, description = #{description}, specifications = #{specifications}, price = #{price}, capacity = #{capacity}, tags = #{tags}, advantages = #{advantages}, certifications = #{certifications}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE supply_supplies SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, supply_id, title, type, category, status, user_id, company_name, contact_name, contact_phone, email, location, description, specifications, price, capacity, publish_date, tags, advantages, certifications, view_count, created_at, updated_at FROM supply_supplies ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
